narrative_summary: Anthropic faces the classic two-button dilemma: patch the jailbreak vulnerability or keep the consumer model running globally — the joke lands on the tension that choosing the second option got their AI models classified as weapons technology.
rationale: Candidate 4 earns the highest score by combining genuine specificity (Mythos jailbreak, 190 countries) with a closing beat that actually lands — 'Keep shipping to 190 countries' escalates the stakes beyond the obvious and makes the export-controls consequence feel earned rather than just restated. The Two Buttons template is a perfect fit for a binary choice that blew up in Anthropic's face.
story_title: Amazon CEO's talks with U.S. officials triggered crackdown on Anthropic models
place: in a burning server room during a performance review
